title: Spring Boot
subTitle: Multi-module microservices and REST APIs
overviewContent: I build multi-module Spring Boot backends (Gradle) with strict module boundaries and independently deployable microservices. I design RESTful APIs documented with springdoc/Swagger (OpenAPI), use QueryDSL for type-safe dynamic queries, and apply Spring Security for role-based access control, OAuth2/JWT authentication, CORS and CSRF protection. Modular architecture and clean configuration management keep deployment pipelines and operations efficient in production.
